shell.degradedBanner: Degraded: verify queue health and object storage.

home.title: Control plane overview
home.subtitle: Evidence-first summaries; each card links to underlying records (tenant, machine, batch, audit).

card.licenseHint: Drill to entitlement envelopes and activation rows.
card.syncHint: Queue lag, replay, and rollout manifest integrity.
card.opsHint: Unified sync, rollout, and platform alerts with ownership. Drill-through is tenant-safe.

stepUpLab.title: Step-up (operator lab)
stepUpLab.body: Dangerous actions require fresh step-up. Server endpoints must re-validate; this is UX only.

preview.title: Signed claim preview
preview.hint: Verify tier, slots, channel, and validity before committing. Server validates signature.

entitlement.transitionOk: Transition is allowed by policy matrix (server re-validates).
entitlement.transitionBlocked: Transition is not allowed from this state.
entitlement.pageBody: State-governed lifecycle, signed-claim preview, and auditable approval for destructive changes.

customers.title: Customers
customers.body: Tenant-scoped customer operations. Server enforces customer.manage on every mutation.
customers.workspaceIntro: Tenant identity, deployment metadata, cohort, and environment flags. Mutations require customer.manage and server-side checks.
customers.metadataHint: Wire to VPS tenant registry; fields shown here are placeholders for the operational form.

bulk.title: Bulk channel reassignment (dry-run)
bulk.hint: Safe bulk: dry-run first, per-tenant lineage version for optimistic concurrency, channel alignment with rollout.
bulk.channelMismatch: License channel and rollout channel differ — resolve before apply.

machines.title: Machines & activation
machines.intro: Heartbeat visibility, trusted-device lifecycle, and offline-policy controls. Actions require step-up and server enforcement.
machines.fingerprintHint: Fingerprint confidence and rebind thresholds are evaluated server-side to limit unnecessary churn.

sync.title: Sync operations
sync.body: Queues, replay, and repair windows. Requires sync.operate.
sync.pageBody: Lag, checkpoints, retries, and repair queues. Actions require sync.operate and server enforcement.

drill.title: Failure drill-down
drill.empty: No failure rows for this tenant.

rollouts.title: Rollouts
rollouts.body: Publish and rollback control-plane artifacts. Requires rollout.manage and step-up.
rollouts.pageBody: Cohort staging, pause/recall, and integrated failure diagnostics. Recall requires step-up and server approval.

diagnostics.title: Release diagnostics (24h)
diagnostics.hint: Signature, migration, and post-deploy heartbeat failures in one view for containment decisions.

health.title: Platform health
health.body: SLOs, integration status, and worker reliability (read-only observe surface).
health.pageBody: Unified telemetry across services, infrastructure pressure, and alert ownership. Drill-through stays tenant-safe.

pressure.title: Infrastructure pressure
pressure.hint: Trend and threshold hints for operators; authoritative thresholds live server-side.

drill.title: Related operational views
drill.body: Tenant-safe incident drill-through links curated views in sync and rollout workspaces without exposing unrelated customer data.

alerts.title: Alerts & ownership
alerts.hint: Acknowledge, assign an owner, and add timeline notes. Drill-through uses operational IDs only.

audit.title: Audit & evidence
audit.body: Structured audit retrieval with correlation id drill-through.
audit.pageBody: Immutable audit trail, support workflows, and operational safeguards. Requires audit.view; mutations are enforced server-side.

ledger.intro: Append-only ledger with per-record integrity hash and hash-chain linkage. Server persists and verifies.

support.intro: Structured tickets, diagnostic bundles with redaction, offline reconciliation, and explicit links to audit records.

harden.intro: Privileged actions require reason codes and step-up; high-blast-radius may require dual approval on the server.

guards.title: Privileged-action safeguards
guards.body: Client hints only — VPS enforces RBAC, step-up window, and audit append.

stepUp.title: Confirm sensitive action
stepUp.description: Step-up required for: {{action}}. Enter MFA or elevated password (server validates).
